name: Over the Keyboard Desk Organizer - Threshold™
description:
Streamline your workspace with this Over-the-Keyboard Desk Organizer from Threshold™. Crafted from acacia wood, it features a slim, elevated design standing on four legs that fits neatly above most keyboards. The multiple compartments design and circular cutout keep pens, notepads, glasses and everyday essentials organized and easy to grab while you work.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
